description_long: This street light features a tall, slender, and smoothly curved metallic pole that arches at the top to support a minimalist lamp head. The lamp head is flat, rectangular, and streamlined, with no visible decorative elements or coverings, giving it a distinctly modern and utilitarian appearance. The pole is unadorned, with a consistent cylindrical profile and a clean metallic finish, suggesting durability and resistance to weather. The base of the pole is simple and rounded, designed for secure installation into the ground. The overall design is functional and unobtrusive, suitable for contemporary urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or parking lots. The light fixture is oriented downward, providing focused illumination to the area below.
description: A tall, curved, metallic street light with a minimalist, flat lamp head and a plain, cylindrical pole. The design is modern and functional, with a downward-facing light fixture.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full height and elegant curve of the pole, with the flat lamp head extending horizontally.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the pole as a thin vertical line, with the lamp head barely visible at the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the smooth curve and the lamp head's extension.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the pole as a thin line, with the lamp head visible as a small protrusion at the top.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Flat, rectangular, minimalist, and modern with no visible decorative elements, coverings, or diffusers.
